title: Geoffrey C. Fox's Contributions to Cloud Computing & Security
description: A visual breakdown of Geoffrey C. Fox's key research areas and their impact on the pillars of cloud security.
relationships: His research in parallel/distributed systems provides the foundation for scalable cloud infrastructure
His work on data-intensive apps drives the need for secure data management in the cloud
His development of middleware directly enables secure and efficient resource sharing
His focus on scientific applications highlights the security requirements for complex cloud workloads
